/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libvoice_classifier.so -o libvoice_classifier.so CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_emotion.c.o CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_speaker.c.o CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_eot.c.o CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_diarizer.c.o CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_classifier_diagnostics.c.o CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_emotion_classes.c.o CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_speaker_distance.c.o CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_mel_features.c.o CMakeFiles/voice_classifier_shared.dir/src/voice_gguf_loader.c.o  -lm
